examples: The credit markets as liquid as a frozen daiquiri.
If light rum and lime juice are used then the cocktail becomes a DAIQUIRI.
A nice fruity daiquiri that exploits the rich treacly taste of a good dark rum.
The Caipirinha (Ki-pur-een-yah) is a kissing cousin to the Cuban daiquiri with some small variations.
She also urged that another commissioner be given a daiquiri concession and told the hotel chairman to give campaign contributions to friendly local judges.
